mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MES_AI_NOTIFICATION (title, message, severity, source_ref, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{message}, #{severity}, #{sourceRef}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, title AS title, message AS message, severity AS severity, source_ref AS sourceRef, is_read AS `read`, created_at AS createdAt FROM MES_AI_NOTIFICATION ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MES_AI_NOTIFICATION WHERE is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE MES_AI_NOTIFICATION SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE MES_AI_NOTIFICATION SET is_read = 1 WHERE is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MES_AI_NOTIFICATION WHERE source_ref = #{sourceRef}
